calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Apr-01-2025 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Apr-01-2025 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, being assigned by Department 206 for Prove-Up Hearing as to Defendant Gayle L. Staleny.

Dept. 505; Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: D. Carter;

Matter was resolved on the pleadings. Court did not go on the record.

Ruonan Wang, Esq. appeared on behalf of Plaintiff JPMorgan Chase Bank, N.A.
No appearance by Defendant Gayle L. Staleny.

Plaintiff JPMorgan Chase Bank, N.A. exhibits for the Court's review:

The matter is submitted.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff JPMorgan chase Bank, N.A. and against Defendant Gayle L. Staleny.

Plaintiff JPMorgan chase Bank N.A. is awarded judgment against Defendant Gayle L. Staleny as follows:

Damages/Principal: $8,928.88
Pre-Judgment Interest: $0.00
Costs: $0.00
Total Judgment: $8,928.88

Proposed Judgment was submitted and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-19-2024 Set For Trial On Apr-01-25 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
